mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, freight_amount, pay_type, order_status, delivery_type, address_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_detail, note, pay_expire_time, refund_status, refund_time, refund_price, after_sale_flag, pay_time, paid, deliver_time, receive_time, finish_time, close_reason, close_time, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, remark, version, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, o.freight_amount AS freightAmount, o.pay_type AS payType, o.delivery_type AS deliveryType, o.paid, o.pay_expire_time AS payExpireTime, o.pay_time AS payTime, o.deliver_time AS deliverTime, o.receive_time AS receiveTime, o.finish_time AS finishTime, o.create_time AS createTime, o.note, o.after_sale_flag AS afterSaleFlag, o.refund_status AS refundStatus, o.refund_price AS refundPrice, o.refund_time AS refundTime, o.receiver_name AS receiverName, o.receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, o.receiver_detail AS receiverDetail FROM mall_order o WHERE (o.is_deleted IS NULL OR o.is_deleted = 0) AND o.order_no = #{orderNo} AND o.user_id = #{userId}
